hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -euo pipefail
# ----------------------------- # Load shared bash functions # ----------------------------- source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/" echo "Loading bash functions from: ${source_scripts_folder}" ls -la "${source_scripts_folder}"
shopt -s nullglob for script_file in "${source_scripts_folder}"*.sh; do chmod +x "${script_file}" || true if [[ -f "${script_file}" && -x "${script_file}" ]]; then echo "sourcing ${script_file}" # shellcheck source=/dev/null source "${script_file}" fi done shopt -u nullglob
# Fail fast if the core functions weren't loaded for fn in assume_role wait_for_command wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs reset_role; do if ! command -v "${fn}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "ERROR: required function '${fn}' is not loaded from ${source_scripts_folder}" >&2 exit 1 fi done
# Only require what is truly required to find the instance + state : "${TARGET_STACK:?TARGET_STACK is required}" : "${S3_STACK_BUCKET:?S3_STACK_BUCKET is required}"
# Allow empty values for optional Jenkins parameters by defaulting to "" DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY="${DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY:-""}" ENABLE_DEBUG="${ENABLE_DEBUG:-""}" SPRING_PROFILE="${SPRING_PROFILE:-""}"
assume_role
# ----------------------------- # Download terraform state # ----------------------------- echo "Download terraform.tfstate file for ${TARGET_STACK} stack" aws s3 cp "s3://${S3_STACK_BUCKET}/deployment_state_metadata/${TARGET_STACK}/terraform.tfstate" "terraform.tfstate"
# ----------------------------- # Extract Wildfly EC2 instance ID # ----------------------------- echo "Extract Wildfly instance ID for ${TARGET_STACK} stack" wildfly_instance_id="$(jq -r '.outputs["wildfly-ec2-id"].value // empty' terraform.tfstate)"
if [[ -z "${wildfly_instance_id}" ]]; then echo "ERROR: Could not extract wildfly_instance_id from terraform.tfstate (.outputs[\"wildfly-ec2-id\"].value)" >&2 exit 1 fi
echo "${wildfly_instance_id}"
# ----------------------------- # Build remote command # - Keep "" on every arg value because empty values are valid # ----------------------------- update_psama_container=$( cat <<EOF sudo /opt/picsure/deploy-psama.sh \ --stack_s3_bucket "${S3_STACK_BUCKET}" \ --target_stack "${TARGET_STACK}" \ --dataset_s3_object_key "${DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY}" \ --enable_debug "${ENABLE_DEBUG}" \ --spring_profile "${SPRING_PROFILE}" EOF )
echo "${update_psama_container}"
# SSM parameters must be: {"commands":["..."]} update_psama_container_json="$(jq -n --arg cmd "${update_psama_container}" '{commands: [$cmd]}')"
command_id="$( aws ssm send-command \ --instance-ids "${wildfly_instance_id}" \ --document-name "AWS-RunShellScript" \ --comment "Deploy PSAMA" \ --parameters "${update_psama_container_json}" \ --query "Command.CommandId" \ --output text )"
wait_for_command "${command_id}" "${wildfly_instance_id}" wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs "${wildfly_instance_id}" "psama"
reset_role
